zh.Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England,: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Brito Albini於大約1126年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素時，他的父親William Brito Albini45歲，母親Cecilia Bigod37歲。他於1144年與Sybil de Valognes在英國英格蘭越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1191年在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Brito Albini于大约1126年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素时，他的父亲William Brito Albini45岁，母亲Cecilia Bigod37岁。他于1144年与Sybil de Valognes在英国英格兰越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1191年在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Albini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Pasquale, Aldo, Amalio, Americo, Armando, Carlo, Caterina, Claudio, Gino, Mario, Maurizio, Nichola, Nicola, Severino, Vittorio.
patronymic or plural form of   Albino  .

variants.name: Albino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Manuel, Ana, Carlos, Julio, Luis, Raul, Ruben, Alfonso, Andres, Angel.  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Giovanni, Luigi, Sal, Santo, Saverio, Ubalda.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Brito
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: contracted form of Birgit ( see Bridget ), made famous in the English-speaking world by the Swedish actress Britt Ekland ( b. 1942 ; her surname was originally Eklund ).

variants.name: Birgit
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Brito Albini was born about 1126, in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Brito Albini, was 45 and his mother, Cecilia Bigod, was 37. He married Sybil de Valognes in 1144, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1191, in Acre, Northern, Palestine, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Brito Albini est né environ 1126, à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Brito Albini, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Bigod, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Sybil de Valognes en 1144, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1191, à Acre, Northern, Palestine, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England,: Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Brito Albini um 1126 in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Brito Albini 45 und seine Mutter Cecilia Bigod 37. Er hat 1144 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sybil de Valognes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1191 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Brito Albini è nato il circa 1126 nel Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Brito Albini, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Bigod, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Sybil de Valognes nel 1144, nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1191, nel Acre, Northern, Palestina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England,: イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Brito Albiniが約1126年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで生まれた時，父William Brito Albiniは45歳，母Cecilia Bigodは37歳であった。1144年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでSybil de Valognesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1191年にパレスチナمنطقة الشمالعكّاで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Brito Albini(이)가 대략 1126년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Brito Albini(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Bigod(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 Sybil de Valognes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1191년 팔레스타인 منطقة الشمال عكّا에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Brito Albini nasceu aproximadamente 1126, em Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Brito Albini, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Bigod, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil de Valognes em 1144, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1191, em Acre, Northern, Palestina, com 66 anos.

ro.Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England,: Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Brito Albini родился около 1126 г. в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Brito Albini было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Bigod, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil de Valognes в 1144 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1191 г. в местности عكّا, منطقة الشمال, Палестина в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Brito Albini nació aproximadamente 1126, en Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Brito Albini, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Cecilia Bigod, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sybil de Valognes en 1144, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1191, en Acre, Northern, Palestina, a la edad de 66 años.
